settings.title: Sharing
settings.description: Share your content to social media, reaching new audiences and increasing engagement.

settings.title: Jetpack Social
settings.header_text: Enable Jetpack Social and connect your social accounts to automatically share your content with your followers with a single click. When you publish a post, you will be able to share it on all connected accounts.

settings.title: Sharing buttons
settings.header_text: Add sharing buttons so visitors can share your posts and pages on social media with a couple of quick clicks.

settings.title: Like buttons
settings.header_text: The Like button is a way for people on WordPress.com to show their appreciation for your content.
